_comment: 50-prompt held-out set for the LLM planner success-rate gate. Each entry: id, goal, expected_ops_any (any one of these in the resulting plan = pass). Categories chosen to exercise the W1 op vocabulary across mech / consumer / industrial parts.

prompts.goal: M6x1 hex socket cap screw, 30mm long
M12x1.75 button head screw, 50mm long
1/4-NPT stud, 40mm long
aluminum block 50x50x25mm with M8 tapped through-hole in center
involute spur gear, 24 teeth, module 2, 10mm wide, 12mm bore
involute spur gear, 60 teeth, module 1.5, 8mm wide, 10mm bore
helical gear, 30 teeth, module 2, 15° helix angle, 12mm wide
transition duct from 100mm round to 80x40 rect, 200mm long

simple boat hull, 1500mm long, lofted from rectangular cross-sections

extension spring, 10mm OD, 1mm wire, 40mm long, 20 turns
ACME leadscrew, 16mm OD, 4mm pitch, 200mm long
